title: Home page inquiries & advertising contact callout

requirements.summary: Add a final bottom section on the Home page showing the inquiries/advertising email callout text.
acceptanceCriteria: The Home page contains a new last section rendered after the current final CTA section (or after the last section when authenticated).
The section includes the exact email text: aryananilshinde6122009@gmail.com.
The section uses English user-facing text and clearly labels the email as being for inquiries & advertising.

file_operations.description: Append a new final bottom section after the existing CTA (and after all other sections) that displays the inquiries/advertising label text and the exact email address content. Use existing styling patterns (Tailwind + shadcn composed components) without modifying files under frontend/src/components/ui. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Make the email a clickable mailto link and add a copy-to-clipboard action with toast feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the email opens the user’s default mail client via a mailto link.
A copy action is available and copies "aryananilshinde6122009@gmail.com" to the clipboard.
Copy success/failure is communicated using the app’s existing toast/feedback patterns.

file_operations.description: Render the email as a mailto anchor (mailto:aryananilshinde6122009@gmail.com) and add a copy-to-clipboard affordance that calls navigator.clipboard.writeText with success/error communicated via the existing sonner toast pattern used elsewhere in the app. Use composed shadcn components (e.g., Button) without editing frontend/src/components/ui. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
